title: cynodon dactylon var. arcuatus
intro: Cynodon dactylon var. arcuatus, also known as a variety of the common Bermuda grass, is a type of creeping grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a variety of health issues such as fever, sore throat, and digestive problems due to its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cynodon dactylon var. arcuatus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in many cultures. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat respiratory and gastrointestinal issues.
